description: Letter from Avraham Ẓaʿir, Jerusalem, to the Qaraite community of Fustat/Cairo. Written in Judaeo-Arabic. The writer greets a great many people by name, including the ḥakhams Yeshuʿa Rofe and Avraham Rofe b. Aharon Rofe, and Eliyya Levi. It seems some or all of these people had made a pilgrimage to Jerusalem. The remainder of the letter is a sharp rebuke for the addressees' failure to fulfill their vow to raise money and sent it to the Jerusalem community upon their return. The letter also contains the cryptic line, "We are Jews like you. Do not think us of the party of the wicked man from Istanbul." (Could this refer to Shabbetay Zevi? Gershom Scholem writes that he did have a number of Qaraite followers. Scholem, Sabbatai Sevi, p. 776.) Needs examination.
description_he: מכתב מאברהם צעיר, ירושלים, לקהילת הקראים בפוסטאט/קהיר. ביהודית-ערבית. כולל ברכות לרבים בשמם ותוכחה חדה על כך שהנמענים לא קיימו נדרם לאסוף כסף לקהילת ירושלים. כולל גם שורה: 'אנחנו יהודים כמוכם. אל תחשבוהו מסיעת הרשע מאיסטנבול.'
